mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT a.*, cb.total_balance AS totalBalance FROM accounts a LEFT JOIN credit_balances cb ON cb.account_id = a.id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT account_id, MAX(created_at) AS last_dt FROM credit_transactions WHERE type = 'consumption' GROUP BY account_id ) lc ON lc.account_id = a.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT account_id, MAX(created_at) AS last_dt FROM credit_transactions WHERE type = 'purchase' GROUP BY account_id ) lr ON lr.account_id = a.id
AND a.status = #{q.status}
AND a.billing_email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.email}, '%')
AND (a.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.keyword}, '%') OR a.billing_email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.keyword}, '%'))
AND a.created_at >= #{q.createdFrom}
AND a.created_at <= DATEADD('DAY', 1, #{q.createdTo})
AND lc.last_dt >= #{q.lastConsumptionFrom}
AND lc.last_dt <= DATEADD('DAY', 1, #{q.lastConsumptionTo})
AND lr.last_dt >= #{q.lastRechargeFrom}
AND lr.last_dt <= DATEADD('DAY', 1, #{q.lastRechargeTo})
ORDER BY cb.total_balance ASCDESC
ORDER BY a.name DESCASC
ORDER BY a.created_at DESC
